completed_slice: Create a deny-by-default normalizer for GitHub artifact-attestation verification output, with adversarial identity and digest tests, without falsely claiming the deployment workflow is already cryptographically wired.

verification.contract: Exact repository, signer workflow, verified flag, and SHA-256 subject digest are required; all other inputs remain not_verified.
verification.production_limit: No signed GitHub attestation or Cloudflare deployment run exists yet; production acceptance remains false.

remaining_blocker: Configure CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in the cloudflare-research environment, then wire actions/attest-build-provenance plus gh attestation verify into the deployment workflow and dispatch it.
next_action: Update cloudflare-pages-research.yml to grant id-token:write and attestations:write, sign cloudflare-deployment-proof.json, run gh attestation verify against the exact repository, normalize the verifier output, pass it into the acceptance manifest, and retain deny-by-default behavior when any cryptographic or identity check is absent.
